accordion_sections.heading: Assessment
accordion_sections.html: • See review draft for full assessment detail.

accordion_sections.heading: Primary care management
accordion_sections.html: • Primary care first where safe; see review-pack.

accordion_sections.heading: Who to refer
accordion_sections.html: • Use threshold-led referral as in review draft.

accordion_sections.heading: Who not to refer
accordion_sections.html: • Do not routinely refer low-risk patients meeting conservative-management criteria in the review draft.
